title: Project Setup: React Router v7 + Tailwind v4
description: Set up the initial React Router v7 project with Tailwind CSS v4. Define custom Tailwind classes for the neocities aesthetic (gaudy borders, stark named colors). See PROJECT.md for design philosophy.

title: Model Viewer Web Component
description:
Web component for viewing 3D models:
- Support OBJ, GLTF, FBX formats
- Orbit camera, zoom, pan
- Material/texture preview
- Reference: tmp/noclip.website/ for implementation patterns

title: Texture Upload & Collections
description:
Core texture functionality:
- Single texture upload
- Folder upload from local computer
- Collections owned by users
- Visibility: public (all logged-in), private, friends-only
- Texture metadata: dimensions, format, seamless flag, tags

title: Moodboards
description:
Shared collaborative moodboards for game vibe discovery:
- Create/edit moodboards
- Add items: text notes, images, textures (from library), models, links
- Invite collaborators
- Export/share board

title: BSP Tools Integration
description:
Tools for extracting textures from game files:
- BSP texture extraction using qpakman or similar
- PAK/PK3 archive browsing
- Reference: tmp/qpakman/, tmp/thirty_flights_of_loving/
- Upload game files, extract and browse textures

title: Auth System: Login + Invite-based Registration
description:
Implement authentication system:
- Login required for all access
- Invite-based registration (users get account by being invited)
- Account tree tracking (who invited whom)
- Admin user creation script (CLI)

title: Admin: TextureTown Import
description:
Admin tool to import textures from TextureTown (textures.neocities.org):
- Use TextureTown API: https://textures.neocities.org/api.html
- Import by category
- Preserve attribution/source
- Only visible to admin users

title: Search & Tag System
description:
Implement texture search and filtering:
- Tag-based filtering (seamless, wood, grass, metal, stone, fabric, water, sparkle, 90s, pixel, etc.)
- Resolution filters
- Full-text search
- Tag management (add/remove tags from textures)
